headline: 3 Profitable Stocks on Our Watchlist
summary: Profitable companies tend to be more resilient, giving them the flexibility to invest and return capital to shareholders. Businesses that consistently generate earnings can better navigate downturns and capitalize on new opportunities.

headline: A Guide to the Gulf’s Trillions of Dollars of Sovereign Wealth
summary: Before the Iran conflict, the oil-rich region was a reliable source of financing for Wall Street deals.
